label: znix home LAN
_comment: NetJSON NetworkGraph (https://netjson.org). Hand-maintained. link.properties.expected_mbit is the SOURCE OF TRUTH for the 'link ran slow' alert: alert when observed link speed < expected_mbit. Fill every TODO switch_port by unplugging one cable at a time and watching the switch web UI.

properties.monitoring: OpenWrt - install prometheus-node-exporter-lua or snmpd; sees its own ports only

properties.model: TP-Link TL-SG108E (8-port gigabit Easy Smart, no PoE)
properties.mgmt: web UI + Easy Smart protocol (UDP 29808); NO SNMP
properties.note: Port numbers in web UI DO map to physical ports (verified 2026-07-07).

properties.nic: en11 USB 10/100/1000 LAN via dock, MAC d8:d0:90:48:db:f7
properties.note: IP is .1.x on a /16 while rest of LAN is .0.x/24 - ODD, suspected cause of slow inter-host iperf (routed via .0.1). TODO fix subnet.

properties.role: USB-C/Thunderbolt dock providing MacBook wired NIC (en11)

properties.history: was 100baseTX until 2026-07-07; fixed by reseating switch-side plug (marginal contact)
was 100baseTX until 2026-07-07; fixed by reseating (marginal contact)
